message:
test: add unit tests for search module (is_ordered_prefix, summarize_messages)

- 20 tests covering: ordered prefix detection (5), participant extraction (2),
  mention parsing with punctuation trimming (2), bullet/ordered list key points (2),
  checkbox action detection (2), keyword action items (2), code reference extraction (3),
  output limit caps (2)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
